title: Document Store Contract
description: Validates the _contract.json file for a Document store. A Document holds prose with optional structured front-matter.

mode.description: singleton = one body.md file (deliverable case); collection = many <name>.md files (working folder case).

front_matter_schema.description: JSON Schema for the document's front-matter. In singleton mode, applies to the single body.md. In collection mode, applies to every file in the folder.

naming.description: Collection mode only. 'free' = any filename (e.g., 'source-cmr-take-2.md'). 'id-pattern' = enforce a pattern like 'doc-001.md'.

id_pattern.description: If naming == 'id-pattern', the regex pattern files must match.

embeds.description: Other stores this document is allowed to embed inline.

syntax.description: How embedded references are written in the body, e.g. {{ embed: stores/sources }}.
